craigslist.title: APPLY NOW FOR OUR 2 BEDROOM TOWNHOME WHILE IT'S AVAILABLE!!
craigslist.full_address: 4797 Kingshill Dr. near Morse Rd, Columbus Apply
craigslist.geocode_query: 4797 Kingshill Dr. near Morse Rd, Columbus Apply
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Kingshill Court is a charming community on the north side of Columbus located right off of Morse Road. We offer one, two, & three bedroom apartment town homes and one bedroom flats. Are you looking for a quiet community to call home in a great wooded setting? You found the right place! We are right off of I-71 only a few minutes from Ohio State and downtown. Our floor plans are spacious and the amenities make it an ideal place to make a home in Columbus. If you are into shopping, dining, and other various entertainments Easton Towne Center is just up the street (Polaris Mall is near by as well). So don't wait stop in and apply for your new home with Kingshill Court Apartments today! ***WATER, SEWER AND TRASH INCLUDED*** Granite-like counter tops* Fully-equipped kitchen with refrigerator, dishwasher, and disposal Private patio* 2 on-site laundry facilities Laundry connections * Full basement* Pet Screening - pet rent based on FIDO score Central air conditioning, 24/7 emergency maintenance Sparkling pool with sun deck Clubhouse, On COTA bus line, Professional, friendly, on-site management Nearby shopping, dining, entertainment Easy freeway access I-71 and I-270 Ample on-site parking Storage
